infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app uses the camera for virtual beauty try-ons and face detection.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app accesses your photo library to save and share your virtual try-on looks.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Beauty Try-Ons to access your camera for virtual makeup and hair try-ons.

plugins.faceDetectionPermission: Allow Beauty Try-Ons to detect faces for accurate makeup application.
